untranslatable_reason: This signal requires ranking stocks by 6-month prior returns and selecting deciles (top/bottom 10%), which requires cross-sectional portfolio construction logic not expressible in single-stock indicator conditions. The allowed indicators support only individual stock technical analysis, not relative ranking, decile assignment, or portfolio-level long/short construction.
translation_notes: The 6-month/6-month momentum strategy is a cross-sectional ranking strategy that requires: (1) computing returns for each stock over a 6-month lookback period, (2) ranking all stocks in the universe by these returns, (3) identifying the top decile (winners) for long positions and bottom decile (losers) for short positions, and (4) rebalancing every 6 months. This fundamentally requires portfolio-level logic beyond individual stock technical conditions. The 'returns' indicator shown above is a placeholder and cannot properly implement decile-based selection.
